report_name: Ontinue Awarded 'Most Innovative XDR Platform' for AI-Driven Security

identities.name: Ontinue
identities.description: A provider of Managed Extended Detection and Response (MXDR) that won the 'Most Innovative XDR Platform' award for its ION platform and 'Agentic SOC' model.

identities.name: The Hacker News
identities.description: A cybersecurity news organization that presented the 2026 Cybersecurity Stars Awards, recognizing Ontinue's ION MXDR solution.
